name: USS Tisdale (DE 33)
events: 19 Sep 1944 USS Seadragon (Cdr. J.H. Ashley, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Tisdale (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Hatfield, USNR) and USS Blackfish (Cdr. R.F. Sellars, USN).

22 Sep 1944 USS Blackfin (Cdr. G.H. Laird, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Charles R. Greer (Cdr. A. Jackson, Jr., USNR), USS Tisdale (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Hatfield, USNR) and USS Besugo (Cdr. T.L. Wogan, USN).

28 Sep 1944 USS Tambor (T/Cdr. W.J. Germershausen, Jr., USN) and USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Tisdale (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Hatfield, USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).
USS Tambor remained out for night exercises with USS Le Hardy and USS Fleming (Lt. K.F. Burgess, Jr., USNR).
